description: COMP-3 odd digit count: PIC S9(5) occupies 3 bytes ((5+1)/2), store and retrieve 54321
notes: PIC S9(5) COMP-3 = ceil((5+1)/2) = 3 bytes. Odd digit count means the high nibble of the first byte holds one digit. Engine uses CobolDecimal (Decimal-based), so byte-level packing is abstracted. Value preserved correctly.
